narrative:
Jefferson Twp township has 953 registered voters, with 53.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.5 percentage points.
